text.title: Testing with pytest Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying testing-pytest must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: No bare `assert` without a message in failing case (`assert x == y, f'got {x}'`).
No `time.sleep` in tests — use `freezegun` or async-await.
No `@pytest.fixture(scope='session')` on a mutable shared object.
No fixtures named `setup_*` — pytest reserves the prefix.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
